meaning: adj.自白的,忏悔的n.(教堂中神甫听取忏悔的)忏悔室
examples: Because the subject matter was so personal, the work of several prominent mid-twentieth century poets has been termed "confessional" poetry.
To treat their poems mainly as documents of personal experience is not just to diminish the poets' achievement, but to ignore their unanimous disdain for the idea of confessional poetry.
"You can't have a successful marriage without being a good listener," Jay says in a confessional.
Designed to be used in the confessional , this app is the perfect aid for every penitent.
This is confessional poetry at its scrupulous best: neither self-dramatising nor self-pitying, but penetrating, focused and unflinching.
